messages.description: output all messages from current to next waiting point
same as bang but temporarily override 'args' with list's elements
pointer to the array if -s flag is used
messages from the sequence or waits if -g flag is given
waits if -w flag is given (which creates a mid outlet)

arguments.description: array name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

flags.name: -g
flags.description: sets to global mode (with symbolic destinations)

flags.name: -w <symbol>
flags.description: sets symbols that define waiting points

flags.name: -w <float>
flags.description: sets number of leading floats used as waiting points

flags.name: -t <float, symbol>
flags.description: sets tempo value and time unit

methods.description: automatically sequence interpreting waits as delay times
stops the sequence when in auto mode
set values for $1, $2, etc in the text
set tempo value (float) and time unit symbol
